class.name: ToggleButton
class.description: Abstract base class for ToggleButtons, used to represent a binary choice. See also [BaseButton] which contains common properties and methods associated with this node.

theme_items.theme_item: The color of the checked icon when the checkbox is pressed.
The color of the unchecked icon when the checkbox is not pressed.

Acts as a boolean. When the value is [code]0[/code] the button will be displayed on the left, when the value is [code]1[/code] the button will be displayed on the right. This is reversed if the layout is in right to left mode. [b]Note:[/b] For [CheckButton], this value is overridden to [code]1[/code] by default.
The vertical offset used when rendering the check icons (in pixels).
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is checked.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is checked and is disabled.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is checked and is disabled.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is checked.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is checked and is hovered.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is checked and is hovered.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is checked and is hovered and being pressed.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is checked and is hovered and being pressed.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is checked and being pressed.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is checked and being pressed.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and is disabled.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and is disabled.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and is hovered.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and is hovered.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and is hovered and being pressed.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and is hovered and being pressed.
The check icon to display when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and being pressed.
The focus icon to overlay on the main icon when the [ToggleButton] is unchecked and being pressed.
